data.name: C1001
data.value: : error C1001: Cannot implicitly convert type '{0}' to '{1}'

data.name: C1002
data.value: : error C1002: Undefined symbol '{0}'

data.name: C1003
data.value: : error C1003: Into a constant cannot be written

data.name: C1004
data.value: : error C1004: Operation is not defined for '{0}' and '{1}'

data.name: C1004_1
data.value: : error C1004: Operation is not defined for '{0}'

data.name: C1005
data.value: : error C1005: The integer constant is to large

data.name: C1006
data.value: : error C1006: The real constant is to large

data.name: C1007
data.value: : error C1007: The IF or ELSIF condition must have the type BOOL

data.name: C1008
data.value: : error C1008: '{0}' is not a member of '{1}'

data.name: C1009
data.value: : error C1009: '{0}' is not a structured type and cannot by selected

data.name: C1010
data.value: : error C1010: '{0}' is not an array type and cannot by selected

data.name: C1011
data.value: : error C1011: To many index parameter for '{0}'

data.name: C1012
data.value: : error C1012: The index '{0}' is out of range

data.name: C1013
data.value: : error C1013: The function call '{0}' has to many parameter

data.name: C1014
data.value: : error C1014: The explicit parameter assignment for the function '{0}' is not supported

data.name: C1015
data.value: : error C1015: A constant cannot be incremented or decremented

data.name: C1016
data.value: : error C1016: Only variables can be incremented or decremented

data.name: C1017
data.value: : error C1017: The array indexing is not complete, the '{0}' cannot be selected

data.name: C1018
data.value: : error C1018: Only integer type can be used as case variable

data.name: C1019
data.value: : error C1019: '{0}' is not a constant, only constants can be used as case

data.name: C1020
data.value: : error C1020: '{0}' is not an integer constant, only integer can be used as case

data.name: C1021
data.value: : error C1021: The case in the line '{0}' has one or more values identical with the values of case in the line '{1}'

data.name: C1022
data.value: : error C1022: '{0}' is not an integer, only an integer can be used as for variable

data.name: C1023
data.value: : error C1023: An integer data type for the final variable is expected

data.name: C1024
data.value: : error C1024: EXIT statement can only be used into a loop statement

data.name: C1025
data.value: : error C1025: CONTINUE statement can only be used into a loop statement

data.name: C1026
data.value: : error C1026: The condition of the while statement must have the type BOOL

data.name: C1027
data.value: : error C1027: Only floating point numbers can be rounded or truncated

data.name: C1028
data.value: : error C1028: Only numeric type is accepted by the '{0}' function

data.name: C1029
data.value: : error C1029: Only bit string type is accepted by the '{0}' function

data.name: C1030
data.value: : error C1030: Wrong number of parameter for the function '{0}'

data.name: C1031
data.value: : error C1031: Wrong parameter assignment for the function '{0}'

data.name: C1032
data.value: : error C1032: IN parameter for the bit string function '{0}' is missing

data.name: C1033
data.value: : error C1033: N parameter for the bit string function '{0}' is missing

data.name: C1034
data.value: : error C1034: Bit string function '{0}' is not defined for the type '{1}'

data.name: C1035
data.value: : error C1035: The function '{0}' is not defined

data.name: C1036
data.value: : error C1036: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' cannot be assigned

data.name: C1037
data.value: : error C1037: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' is not defined

data.name: C1038
data.value: : error C1038: Wrong parameter assignment for the parameter'{0}' of the function '{1}'

data.name: C1039
data.value: : error C1039: To many parameter for the function '{0}'

data.name: C1040
data.value: : error C1040: The function '{0}' accept only one parameter

data.name: C1041
data.value: : error C1041: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' is an output parameter and cannot be assigned to a constant

data.name: C1042
data.value: : error C1042: The return value of the function '{0}' is not used

data.name: C1043
data.value: :error C1043: The selector of the function SEL must have the type BOOL

data.name: C1044
data.value: :error C1044: The MAX, MIN functions accept only numeric parameter

data.name: C1045
data.value: :error C1045: The parameter of the MUX function must have the same type

data.name: C1046
data.value: :error C1046: The parameter K of the function MUX must have the type integer

data.name: C1047
data.value: : error C1047: Only function blocks can be used as type

data.name: C1048
data.value: : error C1048: The function block '{0}' must be instantiate before use

data.name: C1049
data.value: : error C1049: The member '{0}' of the function block '{1}' can not be access

data.name: C1050
data.value: : error C1050: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' is an output parameter and cannot be assigned

data.name: C1051
data.value: : error C1051: Division by constant zero

data.name: C1052
data.value: : error C1052: The function '{0}' is not supported.

data.name: D1001
data.value: : error D1001: The type '{0}' is already defined

data.name: D1002
data.value: : error D1002: The function '{0}' is already defined

data.name: D1003
data.value: : error D1003: This unit contain more that one program

data.name: D1004
data.value: : error D1004: The variable '{0}' is already defined

data.name: D1005
data.value: : error D1005: The member '{0}' of the struct '{1}' is already defined

data.name: D1006
data.value: : error D1006: The lenght of the default value '{0}' is to large for the string

data.name: D1007
data.value: : error D1007: The function return variable '{0}' is already defined

data.name: D1008
data.value: : error D1008: The enumeration type '{0}' is already defined

data.name: G1001
data.value: : error G1001: The type of the symbol '{0}' is not compatible as array range

data.name: G1002
data.value: : error G1002: The default value '{0}' is not valid

data.name: G1004
data.value: : error G1004: The default value type does't correspond to the variable type

data.name: G1005
data.value: : error G1005: Undefined symbol '{0}'

data.name: G1006
data.value: : error G1006: The type of the symbol '{0}' is not compatible as array dimension

data.name: G1007
data.value: : error G1007: Wrong array range for '{0}'

data.name: G1008
data.value: : error G1008: Wrong array default initialization for '{0}'

data.name: G1009
data.value: : error G1009: The constant variable '{0}' must have a default value

data.name: G1010
data.value: : error G1010: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' is an output parameter and cannot be assigned to a constant

data.name: G1011
data.value: : error G1011: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' is an private parameter and cannot be assigned

data.name: G1012
data.value: : error G1012: The parameter '{0}' of the function '{1}' can not be initialised with default values in the FB

data.name: G1013
data.value: : error G1013: The variable '{0}' of type FB can not be instantiated in a constant section

data.name: G1014
data.value: : error G1013: The variable '{0}' of type FB can not be instantiated (Size = 0)

data.name: G1015
data.value: : error G1015: The data type '{0}' is not supported.
